content: Excalidraw binds text to a container via containerId; it measures text with a canvas-based measureText() and wraps via a dedicated wrapText(originalText, fontString, maxWidth) utility. maxWidth/maxHeight are derived per container type (getBoundTextMaxWidth/getBoundTextMaxHeight differ for rect/ellipse/diamond/arrow). On overflow the container itself grows (computeContainerDimensionForBoundText) — a behavior explicitly OUT of scope for this phase.
